zh.lifeSummary: Mary Seeley於1616年出生。她至少有1個兒子。她去世於1665年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Seeley于1616年出生。她至少有1个儿子。她去世于1665年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Seeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a person with a cheerful disposition, from Middle English seli ‘happy, fortunate’ (Old English sǣlig, from sǣl ‘happiness, good fortune’). The word was also occasionally used as a female personal name during the Middle Ages. The sense ‘pitiable’, which developed into modern English silly, is not attested before the 15th century. See also Selman .
Altered form of German   Seele  , respelled to preserve the bisyllabic pronunciation of the German name.

variants.name: Selley
meanings: habitational name from Selly Oak in Northfield (Worcestershire), probably from Old English scelf ‘shelf, ledge’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Selman
meanings: English: nickname for a happy or fortunate man, from Middle English seli ‘happy, fortunate’ (Old English sǣlig) + man. The nickname was also used as a personal name. See also Seeley .
English: from the Middle English nickname or female personal name Sely (see Seeley ) + -man, hence an occupational name for a servant of someone so called.

variants.name: Sealy
meanings: Welsh: from the male personal name Selyf or Seleu, medieval Welsh vernacular forms of Solomon which were replaced by that form in the Welsh Bible of 1588.
Irish: variant of   Shelley   (in counties Cork and Kerry); elsewhere of English or Welsh origin, as in 1 above and 2.

variants.name: Seley
meanings: English: variant of   Seeley  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Seeley was born in 1616. She had at least 1 son. She died in 1665, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Seeley est née en 1616. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1665, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Seeley wurde 1616 geboren. Sie hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1665 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Seeley è nata il nel 1616. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1665, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Seeleyは1616年に生まれた。彼女は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1665年に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Seeley(은)는 1616년 태어났다. 그녀는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1665년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Seeley nasceu em 1616. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1665, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Seeley родилась в 1616 г. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1665 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Seeley nació en 1616. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1665, a la edad de 49 años.
